hero.title: Your AI assistant that sees, listens, and protects
hero.subtitle: Drones + AR Glasses + AI Platform — one ecosystem for professionals
hero.description: A smart personal assistant that helps you in the field: surveys environments, translates conversations in real time, and shows you the right information at the right moment — directly in your glasses.

features.title: What you can do with
features.subtitle: An ecosystem that solves real problems for professionals around the world.

silent.title: Discreet Surveillance
silent.desc: A silent, invisible drone that surveys without being noticed. Ideal for security, inspections, and sensitive operations.

thermal.title: Sees Where You Can't
thermal.desc: Find people in total darkness, through smoke and vegetation. Day and night, with no environmental limits.

watch.title: Hours of Autonomy
watch.desc: Surveys for days in stationary mode, or flies for over an hour. No battery anxiety during your mission.

portable.title: Fits in Your Pocket
portable.desc: Light as a pen, deploys in seconds. No launch equipment, no preparation. Ready when you need it.

ecosystem.title: Three products,
ecosystem.subtitle: Drone, glasses, and AI platform working together to give you an edge in the field.

drone.name: SashaDrone
drone.description: A pocket-sized, silent drone that surveys environments, finds people, and inspects structures — day and night, in any weather.
drone.specs: 11 mission configurations | Designed and made in Europe

glasses.name: SashaGlasses
glasses.tagline: The right information, right before your eyes
glasses.description: Normal-looking glasses that display notifications, translations, and critical data in your field of view. Control them with natural gestures or sign language.

platform.name: SashaPlatform
platform.description: Translates 19 languages in real time, manages your contacts, captures documents on the fly, and alerts you to dangers — all privacy-compliant.

profiles.title: Built for
profiles.subtitle: Every professional has different needs. SashaTech adapts automatically to your role.

general.name: Everyday Use
general.desc: AI assistant for daily tasks: translations, reminders, document capture

tourOperator.name: Tour Operator
tourOperator.desc: Manage groups, communicate in multiple languages, track itineraries

touristGuide.name: Tourist Guide
touristGuide.desc: Tell the story of places with cultural context, translate for tourists in real time

sales.name: Sales
sales.desc: Track contacts, manage your pipeline, never miss a follow-up

logistics.name: Logistics
logistics.desc: Plan routes, monitor vehicles, optimize deliveries

lawEnforcement.name: Law Enforcement
lawEnforcement.desc: Identify people, read plates, record evidence with legal audit trail

fieldOperator.name: Field Operator
fieldOperator.desc: Control the drone, run inspections, collect field data

securityAgent.name: Security Agent
securityAgent.desc: Survey areas, monitor perimeters, detect threats early

compliance.name: Compliance
compliance.desc: Manage GDPR, NIS2, breach notifications, and consent automatically

emergencyResponder.name: Emergency Responder
emergencyResponder.desc: Receive danger alerts, find escape routes, coordinate rescue

military.name: Military
military.desc: Reconnaissance, surveillance, silent operations with full operator control

newsletter.title: Stay updated
newsletter.subtitle: Get news on products, availability, and reserved pricing.
newsletter.success: ✓ You're on the list. We'll keep you posted.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: SashaTech is an Italian deep-tech startup building smart tools for professionals who work in the field.
about.missionText: Give every professional an AI assistant that sees, listens, and protects — anywhere in the world, in any language.
about.teamText: A multidisciplinary team with expertise in aeronautics, artificial intelligence, product design, and security. Based in Bari, Italy. 100% European manufacturing.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We're here to help.

technology.title: How It Works
technology.subtitle: The technology that makes it all possible — without any complexity for you.

propulsion.title: Silent Flight
propulsion.desc: The drone flies like an insect: silent and nearly invisible. Perfect for discreet surveillance and operations where noise is not an option.

thermal.title: Night Vision and Beyond
thermal.desc: Find people and objects in total darkness, through smoke and vegetation. Works 24/7 in any environmental condition.

battery.title: Autonomy That Matters
battery.desc: Days of passive surveillance or hours of active flight on a single charge. Ultra-high energy density European batteries.

stealth.title: Low Observable Design
stealth.desc: Advanced materials and radio management make the drone designed to minimize detection signatures. When you need to stay unseen.

footer.description: Smart tools for professionals. Designed and manufactured in Europe.
footer.copyright: © 2026 SashaTech S.r.l.s. All rights reserved. Bari, Italy.

cookie.title: We value your privacy
cookie.description: We use essential cookies to make our site work. With your consent, we may also use non-essential cookies to improve your experience.
